# terrible_community_general_syspatch (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `revert` (String) Revert system patches.

### Read-Only

- `reboot_needed` (Boolean) Whether or not a reboot is required after an update.
